recentTweets.text:
In the wake of the killings of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo and Johan Sebastian Guerrero, and as ICE ramps up enforcement in the Puget Sound area, I’m standing with local immigration leaders to denounce increased enforcement and to share our work to protect immigrants.

Watch here:

RT @RepMikeQuigley: ICE just killed two people in cold blood, and Tom Homan is saying “there will be more bloodshed.”
 
Proud to join @RepJ…

RT @RepMenendez: There must be immediate independent investigations into the killings of Lorenzo and Johan at the hands of ICE. 

We will k…
RT @USProgressives: Majority of Democrats cast historic vote in Congress to block U.S. weapons to Israel. @repdeliaramirez @RepYassAnsari @…

Trump’s undersecretary who oversees AI exports could not answer my questions about Big Tech’s influence.

The government must have vigorous export controls and a well-established interagency process that is independent from the wishes of corporate CEOs. https://t.co/eTUHvatPvw

"After meeting with Todd Blanche, I feel even more confident i…

If it wasn’t so serious, Hegseth’s new plan to give testosterone to service members would be laughable.

Here are 3 reasons why it’s absurd. https://t.co/x4ZmcY8nJ3
RT @RepSylviaGarcia: I co-led a letter with @RepJayapal demanding answers from DHS. Too many people have died during ICE operations, includ…
RT @RepGregStanton: In the last 9 days, multiple people have died unnecessarily at the hands of ICE. The American people are right to be ou…

Corporate interests are raising meat prices for consumers and putting family farms out of business.

Today, I’m introducing a bill with @RepDeluzio and @RepPatRyanNY to give independent farmers a fair shot and work to drive down grocery prices for families. https://t.co/0oInnsNFIz
This is more insane corruption from Trump.  https://t.co/swWF4E7ADT

Trump and Republicans are stealing from the American people to fund their illegal, forever wars.

I introduced an amendment to block any more Republican cuts or barriers to enrolling in Medicaid. Of course, every single Republican voted against it. https://t.co/JJlsPmMIph

Republicans on the House Budget Committee voted to give another $73 BILLION to the Department of Defense.

They are prioritizing an illegal war over lowering costs for families or reversing healthcare cuts. https://t.co/bwJLVAMRjr

Just hours after being sworn in, Trump fired the U.S. attorney in Seattle.

This is just another attempt to appoint extreme loyalists rather than actually qualified people. It’s unlawful and makes a mockery of our justice system. https://t.co/v8Z1PSFAPA

The Senate must refuse to confirm Todd Blanche.

He is still acting like Trump’s personal attorney, not the attorney general for the people of the United States. https://t.co/egxpbAgg5z

ICE is responsible for the murder of Orlin Hernandez Reyes.

While we can’t bring him back, we can honor him by passing my new bill, Orlin’s Law, to stop ICE from separating parents from their children. Families belong together. https://t.co/mZHb7YZfJG

 https://t.co/0eH0sqUrjJ

3-year-old Orlin was murdered after ICE separated him from his mother, Wendy.

This can never happen again.

Today, I’m introducing Orlin’s Law to stop family separation and prohibit ICE from detaining or deporting immigrant parents unless they pose a public safety threat.

DHS has a pattern of making unsubstantiated claims across numerous shootings that are later contradicted by evidence and witnesses.

I'm leading nearly 200 House Democrats in demanding full, independent investigations and stopping ICE from deporting eyewitnesses.

Lorenzo Salgado Araujo.
Joan Sebestian Guerrero.
Renee Good.
Alex Pretti.
Marimar Martinez.
Julio Sosa-Celis.

6 fatal shootings after Republicans supercharged and enabled Trump’s immigration militia. https://t.co/ZIsWJ5Pfi2

(wit…

Trans people have always and will always exist.

Gender-affirming care is incredibly important. It should be a decision between individuals, families, and doctors — not the government. https://t.co/XizqzN4hWG

The deaths of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo and Johan Sebastian Guerrero raise serious questions and are creating enormous fear in our communities.

There must be independent investigations and ICE must halt removal proceedings against all witnesses. I’m proud to be leading nearly 200 https://t.co/XS5TPmVAj0

RT @RepYassAnsari: This is HORRIFYING.

What’s happening in detention centers across this country is a moral stain on our nation. The abuse…

The Secretary of Forever Wars, Pete Hegseth, just announced they are going to provide hormone therapy to male service members who don’t have enough testosterone. 

Let’s be clear: This is gender affirming care and it completely debunks all of Republicans’ attacks on trans people. https://t.co/HBiAEYFY98

The U.S. has a moral obligation to halt all weapons sales to the Israeli government. We cannot be complicit in genocide, war crimes, ethnic cleansing, and the collective punishment of millions of civilians.

Enough is enough.

I will be a YES on the Massie Amendment today.

This morning, I was notified of another death in ICE custody. This is the 53th death on ICE’s watch during Trump’s second term.

We must continue to fight for accountability for everyone who has lost a loved one. And it’s time to end the use of all for-profit detention centers.

Today, Todd Blanche is before the Senate to be confirmed for Attorney General.

I’m standing with the Epstein survivors who are calling out Blanche's involvement in the release of their private information. I urge the Senate to vote NO on his confirmation. https://t.co/6jwyFHtolA

How are you supposed to know that unmarked vehicles with people in masks and no identification are ICE and CBP?

The tactics that are being used are that of a militia, not a government agency. They must be stopped. https://t.co/LFqq44fGXI

Republicans supercharged ICE with $210 BILLION. And what we’re seeing now is the result — two men killed.

If ICE can do it to them, they can do this to any of us. https://t.co/6jb2LQPOJ9

Higher prices. Fewer movies and TV shows. More corporate control.

These are the consequences of the Paramount and Warner Bros. merger. Good to see 12 states stepping up to challenge this consolidation. https://t.co/vPyU9Z6JVE

I met with Todd Blanche and Pam Bondi after I questioned her in the Judiciary Committee. It was clear that he was involved with the botched release of the Epstein files.

During tomorrow’s confirmation hearing, the Senate must demand accountability for survivors. https://t.co/6lFLN5vjt6

Under Trump, Bondi, and Todd Blanche, the Department of Justice failed to redact the personal information of survivors in the Epstein files.

Today, I introduced the REDACT Act with Senator Booker to allow survivors to sue for their right to privacy and receive compensation. https://t.co/mWOytMK8ba

"Now it's up to the courts to quickly shut thi…

Their message is loud and clear: The Senate must vote NO. https://t.co/cVty5CcgD3

We cannot let the deaths of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo and Joan Sebastian Guerrero go without accountability.

I am calling for immediate independent investigations, NO deporting key witnesses, and not another dime for ICE and CBP. This cannot be our America. https://t.co/wDbspr0mDU

Thank you to AG Brown and our local leaders for standing up to this administration’s cruelty. https://t.co/aCYcmEyyge

Democrats need to do more than just oppose Trump and obsess over polling.

We need to fight for humane immigration reform, stand up to AIPAC, and get big money out of politics. https://t.co/dLkInoWfv5

https://t.co/JwhjuslJII

Disband ICE. Melt ICE. However you want to say it.

There’s no reason for ICE to exist as it exists. https://t.co/Msn5SWSTmL

Meanwhile, Trump is wasting billions on war & vanity projects – doing https://t.co/hQh5BT7ByW

I secured $5 million for this project, and it is very exciting to see it https://t.co/bPsN0Dcny3

Healthcare, not bombs.

Childcare, not tax breaks for billionaires.

Humane immigration reform, not a slush fund for ICE.

Seattle is currently hosting a mega masters — a hearing where hundreds of kids, some as young as three, are going through deportation proceedings. These kids are expected to understand complex legal processes and represent themselves in court.

They deserve better.

❌ Zero consequences for the officers who killed Alex Pretti and Renee Good

We need to pass Medicare for All now. https://t.co/FDoouOb2Au

Not one more cent of our taxpayer dollars should fund this lawless, rogue agency.

The good news is the housing bill will still become law, and we will continue to vehemently oppose the SAVE Act. https://t.co/VQwtDHHobD

Today is the last World Cup game hosted in Seattle! It has been so incredible seeing the energy in our city — opening our arms to welcome fans from around the world.

Whether you’re watching tonight at the stadium, at a watch party, or at home – LET’S GO TEAM USA❤️💙🤍
